title: crotalaria incrassifolia
intro: Crotalaria incrassifolia is a plant species in the pea family, known for its medicinal properties and traditional uses. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. The health benefits associated with Crotalaria incrassifolia include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving respiratory function. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and roots, which can be used to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
